evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Establish modeling standards and data contracts across business domains; Improve data quality and reliability enterprise-wide; Dimensional modeling and semantic layer design knowledge
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour: governance (modeling standards, data contracts) and reliability improvement dominate; no speed/velocity language present.
evidence.domain_risk: data quality and reliability enterprise-wide; support business decision-making across operations, procurement, finance
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate: errors affect business operations without regulatory/financial reporting consequence; not explicitly fintech/regulated.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Establish modeling standards and data contracts; generative BI capabilities; collaborate across domain teams
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mid: named tools (dbt, Dagster), standards/contracts being established, multiple teams collaborating suggests growing but not fully mature function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design and maintain data models using dbt on Snowflake; Establish modeling standards and data contracts across business domains; Construct and oversee pipelines in Dagster
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: specific tools (dbt, Dagster, Snowflake) with clear technical ownership and methodology signals domain expertise.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: data platform; self-serve analytics; modeling support for operations/procurement/finance teams
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data: role focuses on data infrastructure and self-serve capabilities for analytics consumers.
evidence.autonomy_level: Design and maintain; Establish modeling standards; Leverage AI tools; Collaborate with teams
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Mixed: some strategic ownership of modeling standards alongside execution of domain-specific models within team collaboration.
evidence.ai_role: Leverage AI tools to enhance productivity; Active AI tool integration in workflows
evidence.ai_role_explanation: AI user: candidate expected to use AI tools daily to accelerate their own data modeling and workflow productivity.
evidence.testing_framing: Establish modeling standards and data contracts across business domains; Improve data quality and reliability enterprise-wide
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Responsibility: data contracts are named as something the candidate establishes and owns, alongside enterprise-wide quality/reliability improvement.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Establish modeling standards and data contracts; Improve data quality and reliability enterprise-wide
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: data contracts and reliability improvement signal operational concern for pipeline stability, secondary to delivery.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Establish modeling standards; Construct and oversee pipelines; Improve data quality and reliability
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: improving existing data infrastructure and advancing capabilities (generative BI), not building from zero.
evidence.language_gate: English fluency required; Nordic languages preferred
evidence.loss_aversion: Establish modeling standards and data contracts across business domains; Improve data quality and reliability enterprise-wide.
